name: report_phys_opt
short_description: Report details of Physical Synthesis transformations.
full_help:
report_phys_opt

Description: 
Report details of Physical Synthesis transformations.

Syntax: 
report_phys_opt  [-file <arg>] [-append] [-return_string] [-quiet] [-verbose]

Usage: 
  Name              Description
  -----------------------------
  [-file]           Output file
  [-append]         Append the results to file
  [-return_string]  Return report as string
  [-quiet]          Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]        Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
Report

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
